name: Eat Sleep EN Dive
overview: Eat Sleep EN Dive is a travel variety spinoff featuring ENHYPEN as they set out on a new trip together. Away from their usual routine, the members share laughter, stories, and unforgettable moments while enjoying a much-needed break.

trailers.title: EP.0 입벌려 여행 들어간다 (Get Ready: The Trip Begins)
먹고 자고 빠지고 | Eat Sleep EN Dive l BEHIND | ENHYPEN(엔하이픈)
